Direct3D Macros

This section contains reference information for the macros provided by Microsoft® Direct3D®.

  • D3DCOLOR_ARGB
  • D3DCOLOR_COLORVALUE
  • D3DCOLOR_RGBA
  • D3DCOLOR_XRGB
  • D3DFVF_TEXCOORDSIZEn
  • D3DTILE_ZENDTAG
  • D3DTS_WORLD
  • D3DTS_WORLDn
  • D3DTS_WORLDMATRIX
